nasb.text: And there are also many other things which Jesus did, which if they *were written in detail, I suppose that even the world itself *would not contain the books that *would be written.

esv.text: Now there are also many other things that Jesus did. Were every one of them to be written, I suppose that the world itself could not contain the books that would be written.

cnv.text: 耶穌所行的，還有許多其他的事；如果都一一寫下來，所要寫成的書，我想就是這個世界也容不下了。

ccb.text: 耶稣还做了许多其他的事，如果都写成书，我想整个世界也容纳不下。

csbs.text: 耶稣所行的事，另外还有很多。如果把它们一一记载下来，我想，所写出来的书，连整个世界也容纳不下了。
